faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What are the subjects taught in BA?
faqs.answer:
The core subjects are usually the same. Though the electives differ. Some of the major ones taught are - English, History, Psychology, Political Science, Philosophy, Social work, Economics, Sociology, Anthropology, Rural Studies, and more. Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of the infrastructure, library is great, campus life is good.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students in my course. There are no packages offered in my course, nor are there any recruiting companies because it is a medical college, guys! It's an undergraduate medical college where you can only learn and get "Dr." in front of your name. There is still an MD or MS to be done.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no college Wi-Fi available. We have to put up our own Wi-Fi. The hostels are livable; we can manage, but the washrooms aren't too good. The library is great! We can study for however long we want. They don't issue books, though; we just have to sit and study. We have a canteen, which is fine. Sports are played.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: ESIC GULBARGA: the best infrastructure and study patterns.

review_content.Placements: My college is a medical college. It's not about the placements but the bond that it offers. The internship placements are 100% from our college. After completion of 4.5 years, the college offers an internship for 30,070 rupees per month for 12 months. After that, the college gives a 1-year salary bond to the students, in which the students have to serve in the college or its branches for a year with a 1 lac plus package per month, for a total of around a 12 LPA package. Students here get 100% internships in the same college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is fabulous, as it is a central government institution. The cleanliness is unmatched when compared with state government colleges. The hostel offers 3 meals a day for the students in the hostel mess. Students don't need to go anywhere else for food. The taste of the food is bearable. The hostel has its own playroom, where they have carrom and chess for the students. The medical facilities are the best, as it is a medical hostel; casualty is open all the time if anybody faces any health issue.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college, and I recommend students to join it.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there are 125 students. It is a good college. The college fee is Rs.100000 per annum. Most of our interns will complete their internships with good experience and knowledge and become successful in their future careers.

review_summary.college_name: ESIC Medical College, Gulbarga Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of ESIC Medical College, Gulbarga.

content.Placements: I applied to many other medical colleges in Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Karnataka, and I even tried for an upgradation after I got this college in my first allotment, but I didn’t get any higher options since MBBS allotment processes are strictly based on All India Ranks in the NEET-UG exam. After the allotment results are published, the date for joining is announced later. On the respective date, the student and a guardian should be present at the college academic block with the certificates listed in the checklist.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an indoor badminton court and a canteen. The table tennis courts are under renovation. Class timings are from 8 AM to 4 PM. The lunch break is at 1 PM. The hostel and college gates close sharply at 9:30 PM. The college campus is completely safe, but it is not recommended to roam alone outside the campus after 9 PM. Hyderabad is just 4 hours away by train.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Impressive infrastructure and placements could be improved.

content.Placements: 98% of students got placed. The avearge salary is Rs 15,000 per month. The highest salary is Rs 21,000 per month. The lowest salary is Rs 8,000 per month. 99% of students get their internships with a stipend of Rs 5,000 per month. Top roles offered are general physician and junior president doctors.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice, quite picturesque, and large campus to walk around. Our campus is safe and security team is always on duty. Provisions of Wi-Fi and multiple labs for every subject for research purposes are allowed on special permission. Hostel is comfy. The food is alright with a variety of messes to choose from, Rajasthan, North Indian, Kerela, etc. Food expenses are around Rs 4000 per month. The college is attached to 500 beds multi-specialty hospital which was built in 2013 and became operational in 2014. The campus is spread over 75 acres and provides primary and tertiary healthcare facilities to the workers insured under the ESI corporation as well as non-insured persons. It is one of the tertiary care referral centers for smaller ESI clinics and dispensaries.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028

It's an undergraduate medical college where you can only learn and get "Dr." in front of your name. There is still an MD or MS to be done.
content.Infrastructure: There is no college Wi-Fi available. We have to put up our own Wi-Fi. The hostels are livable; we can manage, but the washrooms aren't too good. The library is great! We can study for however long we want. They don't issue books, though; we just have to sit and study. We have a canteen, which is fine. Sports are played.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: ESIC GULBARGA: the best infrastructure and study patterns.

content.Placements: My college is a medical college. It's not about the placements but the bond that it offers. The internship placements are 100% from our college. After completion of 4.5 years, the college offers an internship for 30,070 rupees per month for 12 months. After that, the college gives a 1-year salary bond to the students, in which the students have to serve in the college or its branches for a year with a 1 lac plus package per month, for a total of around a 12 LPA package. Students here get 100% internships in the same college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is fabulous, as it is a central government institution. The cleanliness is unmatched when compared with state government colleges. The hostel offers 3 meals a day for the students in the hostel mess. Students don't need to go anywhere else for food. The taste of the food is bearable. The hostel has its own playroom, where they have carrom and chess for the students. The medical facilities are the best, as it is a medical hostel; casualty is open all the time if anybody faces any health issue.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college, and I recommend students to join it.

content.Placements: In our batch, there are 125 students. It is a good college. The college fee is Rs.100000 per annum. Most of our interns will complete their internships with good experience and knowledge and become successful in their future careers.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. A library is available. The college has good environment. Our classrooms are digital.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are excellent. The teaching quality is good. First, they will teach on the board, and then they will easily explain the dissection part using PPTs and 3D models.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ESIC Medical College, Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The college has an indoor badminton court and a canteen. The table tennis courts are under renovation. Class timings are from 8 AM to 4 PM. The lunch break is at 1 PM. The hostel and college gates close sharply at 9:30 PM. The college campus is completely safe, but it is not recommended to roam alone outside the campus after 9 PM. Hyderabad is just 4 hours away by train.

reviews.review_heading: Impressive infrastructure and placements could be improved.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice, quite picturesque, and large campus to walk around. Our campus is safe and security team is always on duty. Provisions of Wi-Fi and multiple labs for every subject for research purposes are allowed on special permission. Hostel is comfy. The food is alright with a variety of messes to choose from, Rajasthan, North Indian, Kerela, etc. Food expenses are around Rs 4000 per month. The college is attached to 500 beds multi-specialty hospital which was built in 2013 and became...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the infrastructure, library is great, campus life is good.
reviews.review_text: There is no college Wi-Fi available. We have to put up our own Wi-Fi. The hostels are livable; we can manage, but the washrooms aren't too good. The library is great! We can study for however long we want. They don't issue books, though; we just have to sit and study. We have a canteen, which is fine. Sports are played.

reviews.review_heading: ESIC GULBARGA: the best infrastructure and study patterns.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is fabulous, as it is a central government institution. The cleanliness is unmatched when compared with state government colleges. The hostel offers 3 meals a day for the students in the hostel mess. Students don't need to go anywhere else for food. The taste of the food is bearable. The hostel has its own playroom, where they have carrom and chess for the students. The medical facilities are the best, as it is a medical hostel; casualty is open all the time if...

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college, and I recommend students to join it.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. A library is available. The college has good environment. Our classrooms are digital.

reviews.review_heading: Magnificent medical study center.
reviews.review_text: Funded by the Central Government of India, ESIC Medical College at Gulbarga has no shortcomings in terms of infrastructure. Students enjoy researching and observing the lively processes in the labs. There's also an air-conditioned library, several theatre classrooms, and a canteen. The whole building is air-conditioned providing class comfort to the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with best faculty members but needs to improve in many cases.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was world-class, and students have the privacy in the hostel as a single room is allotted to every student. The mess is being run by students association, so there is no need to worry about it. Our college has lecture halls, Karnataka biggest auditorium and organises annual fest, curriculum activities, CME, workshops, health awareness activities, camps, etc.

reviews.review_heading: ESIC the pinnacle of success.
reviews.review_text: Students choose our college especially for its infrastructure it's Just marvelous. We have hostels in the campus for boys and girls separately and also the mess. In the college we have a central library and study room. And also we have a central digital library which is under construction and going to start soon.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hospital is good. Our campus has badminton and cricket grounds. Mess and canteen food is tolerable. The boys' hostel has no timings but the girls' hostel is closed at 10 PM. The hostel is spacious and provides single, double, and triple occupancy rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for studying.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available. They provide water, rooms, cupboards, and toilets. Rules and regulations are meant to be followed.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is one of the best in India. Our classrooms are well-made with modern facilities like ducting and air conditioners. There is a big library with a lot of required books. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel provides triple-sharing rooms for 1st-year students and single rooms for 2nd-year students. There is a ground for sports and a community center for indoor games.

faqs.answer: Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMDCandidates who are graduates in a similar field from a recognised University/Board are eligible to apply.BHMSCandidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

individual_reviews.title: A good college for learning and to get clinical exposure in homeopathy.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from my batch got placed. The college mainly focuses on clinical practice, higher studies, and government jobs, so placements are moderate. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The average package is 6 LPA. Some top recruiters include homeopathic pharma companies, research institutes, private clinics, wellness centers, and a few hospital chains.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms, laboratories, dissection halls, and a central library that provides access to standard homeopathic and medical textbooks. Wi-Fi facility is available, but mostly limited to the library and computer sections. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for teaching. The hostel facilities are average with basic amenities like clean rooms, drinking water, and security. The mess food is simple and hygienic, but not very diverse, as it's mostly home-style. The canteen provides snacks and basic meals at reasonable rates.

content.Infrastructure: The college is very good. Smart boards are available in classrooms. The library is very good for homeopathic students. All types of books are available in the library. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMDCandidates who are graduates in a similar field from a recognised University/Board are eligible to apply.BHMSCandidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow

description: Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute cutoff 2025 will be released soon. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute cutoff for different courses, rounds, and categories to understand the past years' trends. A few more updates are below:

The Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute BHMS Cutoff 2024 is out for the sixth round. The cutoff for the BHMS based on category for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates are given in the table below. Examining the Round 6 Cutoff list, the closing ranks for General AI quota candidates was 229488. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS).

Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute cutoff 2024 has been released for the fifth round, for the candidates seeking admission to the BHMS via AYUSH NEET. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 6 Seat Allotment Result, the most demanded course was Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) with a cutoff rank of 229488 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for learning and to get clinical exposure in homeopathy.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms, laboratories, dissection halls, and a central library that provides access to standard homeopathic and medical textbooks. Wi-Fi facility is available, but mostly limited to the library and computer sections. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for teaching. The hostel facilities are average with basic amenities like clean rooms, drinking water, and security. The mess food is simple and hygienic, but not very diverse, as...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good for studying.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good. Smart boards are available in classrooms. The library is very good for homeopathic students. All types of books are available in the library. The labs are good. Wi-Fi is available in the college. A canteen is not available in the college. The hostel's mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: College provides very good education and hospitality facilities. All facilities are good for studying. Per subject, four faculty members are available. All faculty members are very educated in Master's in Homoeopathy. A smart board is available in my college. The library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice but old. College has its hospital and OPD. Hospitals have many patients. It is in connection with Shree Ram Krishna Seva Mondal. The hostel is very near the college. The hostel fees are Rs. 60,000 per year, including 2 times, our college is very nice. Our hospital gives the best facilities. Our hospital offers all types of treatment in homeopathy. Homeopathy has no side effects.  According to CBSC, our classrooms have smart boards. An anatomy lab with a cadaver with all or...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is very helpful. All teachers are kind and helpful in nature Hostel food quality is poor.
reviews.review_text:
Food quality is not that good, poor-quality food.
Classrooms, libraries and labs are available for detailed study.
We can use a library for reading in our free time.
Labs are good, and practical knowledge is also given to us by teachers.
Classrooms are big and well ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Homoeopathic medical College anand.
reviews.review_text: All the teachers here are good in their own field and are well qualified. They all are knowledgeable in their subjects, and their teaching quality is also good. They all are helpful in study. This course is relevant to the curriculum, and this course made me get interested in homeopathy. So, I will become a good homeopathic doctor.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for BHMS.
reviews.review_text: All the teachers here were good in their own field and were well qualified. They all were knowledgeable in their subjects, and their teaching quality was also good. They all were helpful for studies. This course was relevant to the curriculum, and I got interested in homeopathy through this. So, I want to be a good homeopathic doctor.

reviews.review_heading: All the teachers here are good in their own field and are well qualified.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Education - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the course curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Since this is a part-time course, mostly working professionals take this course, so there are no campus placements. After pursuing this degree, one can easily expect a minimum salary package of 3 LPA. However, the university provides us with a number of counselling sessions and interview cracking skills that are very much required in the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the students are very satisfied with the infrastructure as it is very conducive to learning. The campus is great and eco friendly. It is located centrally, which make transportation very convenient. The library facility is good for students as we can get both reference books and magazines. Classrooms are equipped with sufficient benches, and they are spacious. The food served in the canteen is hygienic and is offered at affordable rates.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is great.

review_content.Placements: Almost 56% of the students are placed every year. For our course, all big-4 auditing companies are top recruiters. Almost 100% of the students got internships in big-4 companies. Roles offered are in good places, from the manager to CEO of the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, playground and theatre. Our hostel has good facilities. The quality of food is average, but the food in the canteen is good. We are also provided with medical facilities and sports and games, and sports are conducted every year.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

overview_faqs.question: What salary can I expect after completing Disaster Management course?
overview_faqs.answer: The Disaster Management salary expert might vary owing to a variety of factors, one of which is experience. Students can start their careers at a minimum salary of INR 2-3 LPA and can earn up to INR 10-12 LPA with experience. A fresh graduate in disaster management makes INR 5.5 LPA on average. A disaster management professional's salary may differ based on their area of expertise, level of education and experience. The industry a Disaster Management professional works in can also affect their Disaster Management salary.

review_summary.college_name: IGNOU Regional Centre, Ahmedabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Great learning experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is convenient and affordable to study here.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placements or internships, but the college is affordable and easy. So, people give it preference. It has international recognition. If you want to start something on your own, like if you want to be a dietitian and want a certificate for it but can't afford to go to another city and don't want to waste more time, you can go for their Diploma courses.
content.Infrastructure: You can find colleges in almost every city, where you can go to study. It has a library and practical labs. You just have to appear for practicals and examinations, so it is up to your choice. I had appeared for exams directly, and they provided lectures on YouTube.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Education - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the course curriculum.

content.Placements: Since this is a part-time course, mostly working professionals take this course, so there are no campus placements. After pursuing this degree, one can easily expect a minimum salary package of 3 LPA. However, the university provides us with a number of counselling sessions and interview cracking skills that are very much required in the industry.
content.Infrastructure: All the students are very satisfied with the infrastructure as it is very conducive to learning. The campus is great and eco friendly. It is located centrally, which make transportation very convenient. The library facility is good for students as we can get both reference books and magazines. Classrooms are equipped with sufficient benches, and they are spacious. The food served in the canteen is hygienic and is offered at affordable rates.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is great.

content.Placements: Almost 56% of the students are placed every year. For our course, all big-4 auditing companies are top recruiters. Almost 100% of the students got internships in big-4 companies. Roles offered are in good places, from the manager to CEO of the company.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, playground and theatre. Our hostel has good facilities. The quality of food is average, but the food in the canteen is good. We are also provided with medical facilities and sports and games, and sports are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the way they have arranged online classes in lockdown.

content.Placements: IGNOU is an open university, so there is nothing about placements. I live in Vadodara, so I don't go to the Ahmedabad regional center. I, sometimes, go to the Vadodara regional center for classes. I don't know about placement offers from IGNOU, so I can't say about it. IGNOU just offers degrees.
content.Infrastructure: The regional center of IGNOU Vadodara is inside the main campus of Maharaj Sayaji Rao University of Baroda. Wi-Fi is good. I don't know much because I haven't attended any labs there till now. But students are saying that it is good. Classrooms are average. There is no library for IGNOU center, but a library is available in MSU, and we can use it too.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning experience.
It is convenient and affordable to study here.
reviews.review_text: You can find colleges in almost every city, where you can go to study. It has a library and practical labs. You just have to appear for practicals and examinations, so it is up to your choice. I had appeared for exams directly, and they provided lectures on YouTube.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: All the students are very satisfied with the infrastructure as it is very conducive to learning. The campus is great and eco friendly. It is located centrally, which make transportation very convenient. The library facility is good for students as we can get both reference books and magazines. Classrooms are equipped with sufficient benches, and they are spacious. The food served in the canteen is hygienic and is offered at affordable rates.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is great.
reviews.review_text: Our college is equipped with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, playground and theatre. Our hostel has good facilities. The quality of food is average, but the food in the canteen is good. We are also provided with medical facilities and sports and games, and sports are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the way they have arranged online classes in lockdown.
reviews.review_text: The regional center of IGNOU Vadodara is inside the main campus of Maharaj Sayaji Rao University of Baroda. Wi-Fi is good. I don't know much because I haven't attended any labs there till now. But students are saying that it is good. Classrooms are average. There is no library for IGNOU center, but a library is available in MSU, and we can use it too.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities in the open university, so all the students live in the rental rooms. Medical facilities are available on the campus. They organise an event every year, including games and sports, to motivate their students. The other facilities available in the college are library, labs, smart classrooms etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is great and has students from various backgrounds.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a kind of average infrastructure like only a few labs, and it doesn't have a library. Since it is a correspondence course, there is not any facility like a hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games. Students who are doing jobs visit the college just to write exams.

reviews.review_heading: IGNOU - Indira Gandhi National Open University is a good univeristy in Delihi.
reviews.review_text: Our university has many floors in every building of courses, we have a good lab facility, and we have a good canteen working on the campus. There are many hotels here and are managed frequently, whenever somebody needs anything there.

reviews.review_heading: Main focus for extracurricular activities and theory aspects as well.
reviews.review_text: Labs having most of the equipments or apparatus used in practicals. College is mainly giving efforts for practicals rather than theory. Sports and games facilities are there but not as much up for the students. College food stuff is not much healthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am partially satisfied with our university as it should provide more practicals.
reviews.review_text: IGNOU is an open university, so it does not have any particular building for a campus. It provides a centre at any government or trust-based college as per the requirement of course. IGNOU provides LD College of Science as the centre for practical lectures and exams in the whole Gujarat region.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, less fee amount and provides numerous courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college is huge with many classrooms for different courses, big libraries, labs and good faculty staff and teachers as well. Many sports activities are conducted and canteen facility is available with good food at reasonable prices, medical aid is also provided when necessary, clean and good toilets, overall college is good in studies as well as infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college only for those who are working.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not good, but there is no need for infrastructure. So there are many centres of this college, and those centres are in different colleges and different area. However, our centre has very good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with quality service good placement in 2012-18.
reviews.review_text:
Good facility provide Wi-Fi access to the Internet connection and access to the fact that I have required to use my laptop and PC work. Best quality service in the classroom and labs. Gujarat University hostel service near the centre. 
30 rooms available in this area. The hotel infrastructure good and modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A friendly college within the right budget.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good in addition to a good environment. People over there are friendly, and I love to share thoughts with them. Classrooms are huge and well-ventilated. For sports, there is an open field to play any game like football, cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is my dream course and want study more
reviews.review_text: Yes

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for studying homeopathy.

review_content.Placements: Our college has good placements. Admission is based on the NEET exam. It is the best homeopathic college in Baroda and all over Gujarat. It is a self-financed college.
review_content.Infrastructure: A canteen is available. The quality of food in the canteen is good and nutritious. The hostel is available only for girls. The food served according to the daily menu is both tasty and healthy. The canteen contains around 10 sitting tables.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are knowledgeable and experienced. The pass percentage is 50%. Exams are difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is the top homoeopathic medical college of Gujarat.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements and job opportunities. Our college provides internships, and we can also go to any other hospitals for general practice. I am still in 1st year. Internships are given by the college in our college hospital as well as in some other affiliated hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a facility for girls hostel, but there is no boys hostel. About 5 girls are allotted in a room, and three times food, i.e., lunch, breakfast and dinner, are provided by the hostel. There are many good facilities for girls. Boys who came from any other city have to manage on their own, which I think is biased towards boys. However, it is safe for girls safety and security. According to the girls perspective, hostel rooms are equipped with all the essentials, and the food is also eatable.

admission_overview.college_name: ICRI Pune Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Dates & Fee

paragraphs: ICRI Pune admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The institute conducts an entrance exam for admission.ICRI Puneoffers UG, PG and doctoral courses in collaboration withAjeenkya DY Patil University. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Management, Science, Arts, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the quick query form, followed by the application form, to apply for admission.

ICRI Pune offers admission to courses based on their performance in the entrance exam. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Candidates must complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below areICRI Pune coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Note:The official website does not mention course-specific criteria. Hence, generic selection criteria is taken.

ICRI Pune admission process includes multiple steps such as registration, selection and fee payment. Candidates need to appear for entrance exam followed by selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in ICRI Pune:
STEP 1: ICRI Pune Application Process 2025

Candidates must first fill out the quick query form available on the institute website. Once the form is reviewed, candidates need to fill out the application form. Candidates can get the form from the ICRI Pune campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,300 to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

ICRI Pune selects candidates based on a written exam conducted by the institute. Entrance exams are an integral part of the selection process, conducted to judge the knowledge of the candidate which is based on Quantitative ability, Communication, Logical Reasoning, General Knowledge, General English & Aptitude Test. Once the candidates are shortlisted, they further need to come for a personal interview round.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final screening is over, selection letters are issued to candidates. The selection letter will consist of all the necessary details along with a registration date. The students need to pay theICRI Pune feeso to confirm the seat for the course they have applied for.

faqs.question: Does ICRI Pune have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, ICRI Pune has good placements. The institute has a 100% placement record and offers high ROI. It provides students with ample industry exposure to enhance their employability. Top recruiters include Accenture, State Bank of India, Levi's, H&M, Zara, Pantaloons, Fab India, Tommy Hilfiger, and many more. ICRI Pune offers internships in Clinical Research & Healthcare Management, and companies like Air India, Smart Storey LLP, Orange Tours, and Fortis Hospital recruit ICRI students for summer internships and on-the-job training.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at ICRI, Pune?
faqs.answer: Hi.The institute offers students with plenty of employment opportunities and career prospects. It offers ample amount of industry exposure to enhance the students' employability. It has an impressive placement record and offers high ROI. ICRI ensures 100% full placements as it has tie-ups with around 500 companies. In addition to this, there are also ICRI Internship programmes offered to students. Top recruiting companies include: Wipro, TCS, Accenture, Ranbaxy, HCL and many more. Thanks

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after an MBA from ICRI Pune?
faqs.answer: The MBA graduates from ICRI Pune can find job opportunities in the government and private sectors. The salary package depend upon the job profile, candidates skill set, and the employer. With good academic record and internship record, candidates can crack high paying job interviews. Some of the top job profiles along with the salary package is presented in below table: Job Profiles Average Salary (in INR) Business Analyst INR 3 - 17 LPA Investment Banker INR 2 - 50 LPA Chief Financial Officer INR 12 - 90 LPA Product Manager INR 5.6 - 38 LPA Management Consulting INR 7 - 42.8 LPA Asset Manager INR 3 - 14 LPA NOTE: This salary details are obtained from Ambitionbox.com.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after BBA in Aviation Management from ICRI Pune?
faqs.answer: There are various career prospects for candidates with a BBA in Aviation Management degree. The ICRI Pune graduates however must have the required skill set. Withe the growing demand for air travel, which is growing dramatically every year, the air transportation industry is quickly becoming relevant. Some of the job options for the graduates are: Logistics Sector Aviation Company Airline Sector Airport Terminals

. ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India. The ICRI Pune Placement Process is presented below:
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Companies are given an option to go to any one of the eight campuses for recruitment of students
Companies are assigned a convenient date to follow-up for negotiation
After confirmation provided by the company, a pre-placement talk is arranged on the date with ICRI authorities
After that, companies conduct a test and/or Group Discussion (GD) to shortlist the interested candidates
Shortlisted candidates are then interviewed for final selection by the company
Result of the final selection is usually announced on the day of interview or within 2-3 days

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila, a candidate must have qualified in the 10+2 examination and appeared in the IIT-JEE examination.The application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila is INR 750 per program. For SC/ST candidates of M.P. domicile, the fee is INR 400 per program.The application fee can be paid online through mponline.gov.in. For other programs, the application form must be submitted to the respective teaching department along with a demand draft drawn in favor of “Registrar, D.A.V.V., Indore”.

faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

faqs.answer: In India, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) Takshashila is recognised as a respectable university. The college is renowned for offering high-quality academic programs, especially in subjects like humanities, management, and commerce. It provides a supportive learning atmosphere with knowledgeable instructors committed to the growth and research of its students. Libraries, labs, and extracurricular activities are among the contemporary amenities on campus that support a well-rounded educational experience. Students are drawn to DAVV Takshashila because of its excellent placement record and the numerous organisations that visit for recruitment. All things considered, DAVV Takshashila is a wonderful option for students looking for high-quality education and job possibilities because of its academic rigour, teaching knowledge, and placement opportunities.

Students are drawn to DAVV Takshashila because of its excellent placement record and the numerous organisations that visit for recruitment. All things considered, DAVV Takshashila is a wonderful option for students looking for high-quality education and job possibilities because of its academic rigour, teaching knowledge, and placement opportunities.

For SC/ST candidates of M.P. domicile, the fee is INR 400 per program.The application fee can be paid online through mponline.gov.in. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Law, Hospitality & Travel, Engineering, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Teaching & Education, Humanities & Social Sciences, Beauty & Fitness, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Medicine & Health Sciences, Design, Science, Accounting & Commerce. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. + M. Tech. in IT - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).

content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st semester, so I don't know too much about placements, but I can say that placements are not too good in our college as compared to NITs and IIITs. The highest package offered is 39 LPA, which was offered in the year 2023. The average package offered is around 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are extraordinary. They have a good sense of humour, so they can make us laugh. They do not insult anyone to make us laugh. They are just good human beings. There are 4 exams per semester, 3 MSTs, and one end-semester exam. The best of 2 out of 3 will be taken as a result of MST. I am currently in the first semester of the Information Technology course. My course is about the IT sector, and I know the value of that. Our faculty members are good at teaching and friendly with students like us who didn't get the lecture the first time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 8 CGPA or more. No backlogs. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA-4 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA- 8 LPA. Companies are Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. The percentage of students is about 8 CGPA, and the company is Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college. I have no idea about sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.

content.Placements: This course is new, and in this college, this is the first year of this course. Overall, across all CS branches, the highest package offered is 57 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. Microsoft, Google India, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Adobe, etc., are the main companies that came for placements. 70 percent of students got internships from this course in small tech companies. Senior and junior software engineer roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ground-level information of DAVV.

content.Placements: Above 60 percent of students got placed from every batch every year, and the remaining 40 percent are trying to find off-campus placement, but they don't get any support from the college. 1.5 LPA to 20 LPA is the package offered, and the average is 5 LPA to 8 LPA. TCS and Infosys are recruiting companies. 25 percent of students got internships in mostly TCS and Infosys. Web developer is the role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

paragraphs: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campusadmits students based on their merit. The college offers programmes at UG in the streams of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education, Beauty and Fitness, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Candidates should meet the eligibility qualification set by theDevi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus. Candidates need to visit the official website to apply for Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus admission. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus fee for UG isINR 15,000 - 3,53,280. Candidates selected for admission have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

reviews.review_heading: DAVV Indore is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college.  I have no idea about sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

reviews.review_heading: Ground-level information of DAVV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good, especially for the core. Mechanical is best for core.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good in terms of infrastructure. All students live like a family. A single room is allotted for the final year. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. VLSI lab for Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering. Mess is also available. Medical facilities are also good. For sports, you have to go to the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of high ROI.
reviews.review_text: Faculty isn't good as we expected. Rather than Wi-Fi, labs and library are more than good. Food quality is the worst I have seen, no sports and medical facilities, and no games have been played yet. The hostel warden is also very rude towards students regarding mess food and health issues.

reviews.review_heading: Rude faculty, no proper water coolers, and no digital screens.
reviews.review_text: Ragging cases are reported. There are not sufficient rooms for students, so some students live in rented PG flats. Food is not included in the hostel fee. There is no proper equipment and playground facilities on the IET DAVV campus. Wi-Fi passwords are provided at the end of the semester. There is no proper mobile network or Wi-Fi connectivity in the college. There are no smart classrooms, projectors, or LED screens in classrooms. Computer labs are available, but faculty does not take students ...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure. It offers quality education with a good placement rate.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the campus. A decent library is provided with the availability of books in all courses. The quality of food provided is also decent in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available, and basic medicines are available in each department block.

reviews.review_heading: It is really good in all respects except for the low infrastructure and hostels.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not good. The mess is also not good. Wi-Fi is okay in many rooms. The library is good with a big reading area and a lot of books. There are no medical facilities in the hostel because the college is in the centre of the city. There are no sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is good government college strong placement in CSE, IT, ECE ROI is very good.
reviews.review_text: Above average infrastructure, decent classroom, lab, library, good Wi-Fi facility, big campus full of greenery hostels are basic. Mess food is very poor, campus life is simple not very luxuries not more comfort are there. Every month mst are held I did say it is solid and reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, second best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CSE department at my college is decent. We have Wi-Fi facility in every department of our college and its library, we have updated computer labs and access to a large central library. Hostel facilities are average, rooms are simple but livable, and the mess food is okay, though great. The campus has basic medical facilities, a sports ground, and areas for games.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Indore for the IT branch. Its most famous in Indore for its huge campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for you in the IET department on the bypass are available in libraries. Classroom is very neat and clean. The facilities are available in the hostel, just like a water cooler, a mess canteen, Wi-Fi, and a very clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: School of computer science and information technology, DAVV, Indore.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is good because it contains big grounds, an athletics ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a tennis court, and cricket grounds. And whole sports are just like a dream university, and for a sports person, it's the best place for this amount.

reviews.review_heading: Short review about SCSIT.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The college provides a good campus with greenery all around. The labs are okay, not the best, they are average. The Wi-Fi of the college is good for basic tasks, and the library has all the essential books you need during your academic period.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences:

faqs.answer: A:    Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 on Placements based on 16 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers MBBS courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MD and MS. The Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences course fee ranges between INR 3,000 to 75,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college for facilities, good placements and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. 50% of students got internships from our course and MBBS students in the medical profession. Our course is the best for future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection on our campus has low speed. The campus has labs and the best classrooms with AC. The library is available for reading, and library time for all students is from 9 am to 12 am, which is the best. Our campus has sports and medical facilities, and they are the best. A mess and canteen are also available.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty are knowledgeable, and their teaching quality is the best. In our college, we have 4 exams per year, and university exams are important for our upgrade to the next year. It is not difficult to pass semester exams in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: As the name of the college suggests that this college is for medical studies. It includes UG courses mainly as MBBS and also PG courses like ortho, dermatology, paediatrics, etc. It also includes paramedical courses like DMLT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus includes all the necessary equipment for medical studies along with a gym, playground, hostel, mess, canteen, and library. Most importantly, this college is situated just near the Kutch district's biggest general hospital. So clinical knowledge can be obtained. In the hostel, the rooms are average, but the cleanliness is superb. Wi-Fi service is not available but other necessities can be fulfilled. The hostel is divided into 7 blocks from A to G, A and G blocks are for UG girls, B, C, D, and E are the blocks for UG boys, and E block is for PG students. Mess food is good compared to other nearby medical colleges. Sports equipments are available and space is provided.

individual_reviews.title: Insight of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences

content.Placements: Batch size of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences is 150 students in total. MBBS is done in four and a half years, and there is one year of internship that is compulsory to complete to get the degree. Students get 18 thousand per month for their internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course is well maintained by the college staff. The college is located in the beautiful city of Bhuj in Kutch. The college has a big campus for the hostel and a combined hospital for internship. The hostel is divided into 4 buildings for boys and 2 buildings for girls.

individual_reviews.title: I like hostel, and I also enjoy our hostel life.

I like to stay at the hostel more than home, because the infrastructure, friends, and environment are fine. In every room, cupboard is available. Mess food is good compared to other nearby medical colleges. Sports equipments are available and space is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Insight of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is well maintained by the college staff. The college is located in the beautiful city of Bhuj in Kutch. The college has a big campus for the hostel and a combined hospital for internship. The hostel is divided into 4 buildings for boys and 2 buildings for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I like hostel, and I also enjoy our hostel life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is very good and attractive. I like our hostel more than my home. I like to stay at the hostel more than home, because the infrastructure, friends, and environment are fine. In every room, cupboard is available. Three boys stay in every room, and every student has one bed, one plug at the site of the bed, and a cupboard. Timely cleaning services are provided by hostel guards, and good security is available. Classrooms are also available. Air-conditioners are provided in the...

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for facilities, good placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection on our campus has low speed. The campus has labs and the best classrooms with AC. The library is available for reading, and library time for all students is from 9 am to 12 am, which is the best. Our campus has sports and medical facilities, and they are the best. A mess and canteen are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus includes all the necessary equipment for medical studies along with a gym, playground, hostel, mess, canteen, and library. Most importantly, this college is situated just near the Kutch district's biggest general hospital. So clinical knowledge can be obtained. In the hostel, the rooms are average, but the cleanliness is superb. Wi-Fi service is not available but other necessities can be fulfilled. The hostel is divided into 7 blocks from A to G, A and G blocks a...

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine here if you have contact in the senior batches.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, there's also a football ground here where we used to play football, and hostels are also in good condition, but yes in some hostels maintenance isn't up to the mark there are issues with cleanliness but yes otherwise it's good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good placements, scholarship and  wonderful infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College lecture halls are large, clean,  also Wi-Fi is available in college. 8-9 air conditioners are present in single room. Attendance machine is also there. College is very big, has a large auditorium for many celebrations. A large and beautiful anatomy garden is also present. Practical labs are big, modern, cleaned with all specimens are available, excellent quality instruments and charts. Hostel room is triple sharing,  3 beds,  2 fans, 3 study tables, 3 racks for books, 3 cup boards ,3 nig...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the education and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big enough to accommodate the strength of 150 students. The classrooms are air-conditioned and also have a projector. The laboratories are very good and contain all instruments needed for our practice. Various laboratories are present to form various practicals. This college is very large and contains all types of books. It also contains recent research papers through which students can know about recent research. The hostels are also very good. The rooms are well furnished an...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and people are also good here.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like classrooms, a library, labs, and a canteen are available on the campus, and they are well-maintained. It has a huge library and good labs. The canteen has many varieties of food. Mess facilities are also available on a yearly basis for 4 times a day. It has a calm environment, and the security is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for passing MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It is a fully Wi-Fi campus, with an air-conditioned library and classrooms. Our college also has an auditorium in which all events are conducted like convocation, etc. The auditorium has a capacity of 3,000 people, and it is fully on a central air-conditioner. The hostel is on our college campus. There are 5 blocks in which 2 blocks are for girls, and 3 blocks are for boys. Our college also has a canteen and mess facilities. Our college mess food is...

reviews.review_heading: Gujarat adani institute of medical sciences.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities provides by the college are good. 
There are in total 5 lecture halls with capacity of around 200+ students. 
All the departments have the lab facility. The central library of the college has all the UG and PG courses books and also it has the latest journals published in medical field and there is also computer facility available. 
Hostel facility is good and the quality of food in mess is also okay .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college because of faculty members, infrastructure and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: We have well light and air-conditioned classrooms, which has the capacity to accommodate 160 students. A Wi-Fi connection is available for internet-related activities. There is a very good library where many books and videos are available for studying. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very good, and the quality of food served in the mess and the college canteen is fine. We have an established basketball court and a garden for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The campus is spread over 27 acres, so it is quite huge. There is a big government hospital on the campus. A huge library is present where students can study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Aims, a stable by a student.
reviews.review_text: We have hostel rooms with three sharing. We have a lecture hall that can accommodate all the batches at once and is air-conditioned. Our library has three floors with working hours from 6 a.m. to 2 a.m. The hostel rooms are very neat and clean, with various furniture provided. Each student is given a bed, a cupboard, a desk, and a chair. Bathrooms and toilets are general.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: All the department staff are awesome and well experienced. The college has all the laboratories for multiple subjects. There are 4-5 lecture halls and a huge auditorium. A 3-floor library is available 24/7, and students can read there peacefully. There is a canteen, basketball ground etc.

reviews.review_heading: All about GAIMS campus. Overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: Four times Food is provided at the mess. Positive vibes in the hostel: proper security and rooms with proper ventilation. Rooms have fans, tube light study tables and chairs, and a bed for each student. A total of three students are allowed to stay per room.

college_info.intro: Rajarshi Tandon Open University Allahabad courses are provided through online and distance learning modes. UPRTOU offers undergraduate, postgraduate, PG diploma, certificate, and PhD programmes across various streams. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. Uttar Pradesh Rajarshi Tandon admissions are mainly based on the aggregate obtained by candidates in the qualifying degree. However, for a few courses, such as MBA, BEd, BEd (SE), and others, the university conducts entrance exams. Rajshree Tandon University Prayagraj assignment is also offered for all the programmes. admission_overview.college_name: UPRTOU Course Admissions 2025: Last Date, Fee, Eligibility Criteria, Application Form

paragraphs: UPRTOU Allahabad admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts entrance exam for MBA, B.Ed and MCA admission. The university offers courses at UG, PG, diploma and certificate levels. The courses are offered across various disciplines: Humanities, Sciences, Social Sciences, Management Studies, Education, Computer and Information Sciences, Health Sciences, Agriculture Sciences and Vocational Studies.UPRTOUis UP's only open university and offers the courses above through open and distance learning modes. The programmes are conducted in the semester as well as in yearly patterns.Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.
UPRTOU Allahabad Admissions 2025: Highlights

UPRTOU offers courses in distance education mode. Candidates can pursue their courses without attending offline classes. The university offers more than 100 courses at UG and PG levels. Below are theUPRTOU Allahabad admissionhighlights:
Particulars
UPRTOU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 1,200 - INR 39,000
PG courses:INR 3,700 - INR 36,000
How to apply?
http://www.uprtou.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
UPRTOU Allahabad Brochure

Candidates must ensure that they fulfil the eligibility criteria required for admission in their preferred course.The university conducts an entrance test for admission to MBA, MCA and B.Ed programmes. Below are the topUPRTOU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor's or master's degree in Science/ Social Science/Humanities/ Agriculture/ Commerce or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate or,
Graduation in Engineering/ Technology with at least 55% aggregate
Check otherUPRTOU courses

UPRTOU feeis a sum of various components such as a caution deposit, tuition fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. The fee amount further varies depending upon the chosen course or specialisation. Below are the topUPRTOU coursesalong with their fee:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Uttar Pradesh Rajarshi Tandon Open University admissionsbegin with registration. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for a course. The selection for courses is mostly merit-based. Aspirants need to pass an entrance exam for some of the PG courses. Check below the step-wiseUPRTOU Allahabad admission process:
The application process is completely online for all courses of UPRTOU. Candidates need to provide personal, academic and other details to fill out the application form.

UP Rajshri Tandon Open University offers direct admission to most of the courses by considering the applicant’s aggregate in the bachelor’s degree. Hence, aspirants must complete a graduation degree to apply for any of the UG or PG courses. For admission to MBA, MCA and B.Ed, the university conducts separate entrance exams.
Once the candidates have submitted their application form, they receive confirmation for admission. Shortlisted candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat at the university.

faqs.question: Is MSc available at UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU offers MSc for two-years in distance education mode. The programme is spread across four semesters. MSc is offered in various specialisations such as such asBiochemistry,Statistics,Computer Science, etc. Candidates can apply for MSc after completing a minimum of graduation in relevant disciplines. The university shortlists candidates for MSc based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MSc at UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU offers admission to MSc based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria and holding the documents for the same can apply for MSc at UPRTOU. Once the candidates have submitted their application form, they receive confirmation for admission. Shortlisted candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat at the university.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MSc at UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for UPRTOU Allahabad MSc ranges betweenINR 5,200 and INR 28,000.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. UPRTOU fee is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the process of admission in UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU admission process begins with registration. Candidates are first required to select the course and fill out the application form. UP Rajshri Tandon Open University offers direct admission to most of the courses by considering the applicant’s aggregate in the bachelor’s degree. The university conducts an entrance exam for MBA, B.Ed and MCA. Once the selection is over, aspirants receieve confirmation for their admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU eligibility criteria differs course-wise. Aspirants must pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses and graduation for PG courses. Below is course-wise eligibility for UPRTOU:CourseCommon EligibilityMScBachelor's degree in relevant subjectsMBAGraduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for the SC/ STCandidates) Or 3 years of Managerial /Supervisory or Working Experience after completinggraduation in any disciplineBAClass 12 in the relevant streamMAGraduationB.EdBachelor's or master's degree in Science/ Social Science/Humanities/ Agriculture/ Commerce or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate or,Graduation in Engineering/ Technology with at least 55% aggregate

faqs.question: How many courses are available in UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU offers various UG, PG Diploma and certificate courses in distance education mode.  The courses are offered across various disciplines: Humanities, Sciences, Social Sciences, Management Studies, Education, Computer and Information Sciences, Health Sciences, Agriculture Sciences and Vocational Studies. Candidates must complete Class 12 to apply for UG courses. A minimum of graduation is required to apply for PG courses.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at UPRTOU Allahabad?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU Allahabad admissions usually open in January. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. The university concludes the admission process by April. The selection for UPRTOU Allahabad is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

placement_data.title: UPRTOU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Uttar Pradesh Rajarshi Tandon Open University placement data has not been released on the official website. As per the data sourced from Shiksha students reviews, the highest package offered was INR 12 LPA . The average package was between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA . The overall placement rate was 70% . The top recruiters are Amazon, Wipro, Flipkart, etc.

tables.context: What is the highest package offered at UPRTOU?

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: As per the Shiksha students' review, the highest package offered during the recent placement sessions was INR 12 LPA. Tabulated below is the UPRTOU highest package for reference: Particulars Placement Statistics the highest package INR 12 LPA

faqs.question: Does UPRTOU Allahabad offer placements?
faqs.answer: UPRTOU Allahabad offers placements to all students. Rajarshi Tandon Open University has a very active and transparent placement cell that organises regular placement drives and attracts top MNCs every year. UPRTOU has not released the latest placement report for the year 2023. Since UPRTOU is an open university, there is less possibility of releasing a placement report for the year 2023. However, as per Shiksha's review page, the average package offered was in the range of INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA during the recent placement drive. Overall, more than 70% of students were placed, and many top companies such as Amazon and Flipkart, among others, visited the UPRTOU campus during the latest placement drive.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing an MBA from UPRTOU?
faqs.answer: MBA graduates of UPRTOU are eligible for a variety of government jobs. These jobs are offered by various recruiting organisations and departments, such as government banks, railways, airports, PSUs, etc. Some government jobs that UPRTOU graduates can take up after completing an MBA are listed below: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) jobs Specialist Officer Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Grade B Officer Probationary Officer Indian Railways Management Service (IRMS) Quality Assurance Manager SSC CGL Central Excise and Customs Inspector (C&CE)

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has really good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students get placed in our course. The package offered in our course is not important and good but jobs are important. The average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Narayana, Meditrina, ASG, etc. All students have a mandatory internship program.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Labs have all the required equipment to perform activities. A library is also available in the college. The hostel has good facilities like purified drinking water, clean washrooms, and toilets.

individual_reviews.title: Nursing student college review.

content.Placements: More than 60% of students got placed in top companies. The highest package offered for the course was nearly 18 LPA. Top recruiting companies were there in this course. More than 60% of students got internships in a year.
