highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Srinagar:

faqs.answer: A:    Government Medical College, Srinagar is a well-known institution for MD, M.Ch, PG Diploma, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Medical College, Srinagar has course specializations in Oncology, Urology, Physiology, Dermatology, Ophthalmology, Anaesthesia, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Pharmacology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Obstetrics & Gynecology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Medical College, Srinagar?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college in every aspect of faculty, placements, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: A total strength of 180 students enroll each year in the MBBS course. The MBBS course duration is of 5.5 years including 1 year of paid internship. Seats are divided into state quota (85%) and AIQ quota (15%). GMC Srinagar is known for its 7 attached hospitals in different locations of Srinagar. There are good academics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Each department has its lecture halls. Demonstration labs are equipped with first-class medical instruments and devices. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with double and triple seating occupancy. An outdoor stadium and an indoor stadium are present in the boys' hostel. There is a good mess facility with multiple cuisines of food.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: An overall good college..

review_content.Placements: The Government Medical College in Srinagar is a good college with excellent infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. It offers the MBBS course with an intake of 180 students per year. After the four and a half year course, every student gets a paid internship of one year. The stipend for interns is currently Rs 12,300 and is expected to be increased soon. The college has seven associated hospitals, including one super specialty hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is okay, and the college is 65 years old, so necessary renovations are done from time to time. However, there are still lots of things that could be improved. The equipment and facilities are excellent and on par with any medical college of the highest standard. There is no college canteen, but students can use the hospital canteen. Hostels have proper canteens, and the food quality is good. Sports activities are given priority by proper budget allocation, and every year there is an annual sports meet where students and faculty members participate. The best batch is chosen, and proper teams are formed for intercollegiate tournaments.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Srinagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college, brilliant faculty, and even better placements.

content.Placements: 105/150 students got into a PG course in various colleges across the country. One person got into AIIMS Delhi Most of them are selected into SKIMS for various PG courses. Those who did not secure admission into any PG course did manage to secure their jobs in medical offices at the Directorate of Health Services, Kashmir.
content.Infrastructure: College has free Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. Library is not that good but a new library is being inaugurated. There are excellent classrooms, including some smart lecture halls as well. A very good auditorium is there. GMCS comprises of following hospitals SMHS Hospital which houses the department of medicine, surgery, ophthalmology, ENT, and dermatology. Super Speciality Hospital, Children Hospital housing the department of pediatrics which is a 500-bed facility. Bone and joint hospital which is department of orthopedics, Government LD Hospital, and SDH Hazrat Bal.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for clinical studies. Best in the northern region of India.

content.Placements: Clinical studies are excellent that help to crack NEET PG and get placed Salary is good about Rs. 60,000 per month after cracking NEET PG. There are a total of 180 seats and every student gets a chance for internships to enhance their skills. Medicine, surgery, radio, and derma all are good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. We have Wi-Fi and library available from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Canteen is not available in college but in hostel it is available. Sports and games facility is nice. Mess is available in hostel till 11:00 AM. Ground for boys hostel is very big where you can play and enjoy every kind sport.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with this college in every aspect of faculty, placements, and facilities.

content.Placements: A total strength of 180 students enroll each year in the MBBS course. The MBBS course duration is of 5.5 years including 1 year of paid internship. Seats are divided into state quota (85%) and AIQ quota (15%). GMC Srinagar is known for its 7 attached hospitals in different locations of Srinagar. There are good academics.
content.Infrastructure: Each department has its lecture halls. Demonstration labs are equipped with first-class medical instruments and devices. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with double and triple seating occupancy. An outdoor stadium and an indoor stadium are present in the boys' hostel. There is a good mess facility with multiple cuisines of food.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An overall good college..

content.Placements: The Government Medical College in Srinagar is a good college with excellent infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. It offers the MBBS course with an intake of 180 students per year. After the four and a half year course, every student gets a paid internship of one year. The stipend for interns is currently Rs 12,300 and is expected to be increased soon. The college has seven associated hospitals, including one super specialty hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is okay, and the college is 65 years old, so necessary renovations are done from time to time. However, there are still lots of things that could be improved. The equipment and facilities are excellent and on par with any medical college of the highest standard. There is no college canteen, but students can use the hospital canteen. Hostels have proper canteens, and the food quality is good. Sports activities are given priority by proper budget allocation, and every year there is an annual sports meet where students and faculty members participate. The best batch is chosen, and proper teams are formed for intercollegiate tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, I loved it here—good placements, but it needs to improve infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 100 percent since it is a government college, everybody gets settled. Package varies from 40k to 60k per month. Mostly, it is government jobs, and some do PG or house jobs; a few get jobs in government hospitals as well. Everybody gets an internship in their own college, mainly as physicians, and internships in other subjects as well.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are average without AC, only a few fans. The library isn't that good, also without AC and congested. The hostel is also congested and difficult to get into during the first year. The canteen is also below average. There is an indoor stadium present and a good field to play football and cricket.

faqs.answer: A:    There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, ma

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Vidhyadeep University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Vidhyadeep University courses range between INR 50,000 to 4,24,000.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. It provides many facilities like a canteen, hostel, cricket and volleyball ground, parks, and a big parking lot. Classrooms and labs are very good. Library is average, but it provides enough books for every student. Medical facilities are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Some of them are not knowledgeable and very poor at teaching. They help students in every way possible. Semester exams are not difficult if students study properly throughout the semester.

faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, manufacture and maintenance, etc. Working as programmer, web developer, and E- commerce specialist with telecommunications companies, automotive companies, aerospace companies, etc. can be a lucrative career option as well. Moreover, numerous national and multi-national computer manufacturing companies, computer hardware system design and development companies, computer networking companies, software development companies, etc. require computer professionals in large numbers.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Vidhyadeep University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good College with good campus and environment.

content.Placements: Currently, I am pursuing my course of B.Tech in Computer Engineering. This year, my seniors got placed; approximately 50% of students received placement from the college campus. Companies like Reliance and TCS had come to this college previously. Placement opportunities are provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough. The college has a ground and a separate garden, and its campus is very good. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college and are free for all. There are around 6 buildings on the campus of different colleges of Vidyadeep University.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members and infrastructure are fantastic.

content.Placements: Placement facilities are very bad, especially in our department. Very few students are getting placed through college. It is better if you find an external placement opportunity throughout your degree. The average package is around INR 2 lakhs per annum, which is low. Internships are held in the final year of college.
content.Infrastructure: The buildings, parks, labs, and overall infrastructure of this college are fantastic. The scenery is beautiful, and the atmosphere at the college is very peaceful. According to hostel students, mess food and hostel facilities are average. The canteen provides hygienic and good-quality food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is good for enjoyment and degree but not that good about practical knowledge.

content.Placements: The placements opportunities are not good in this college, only around 15-20% students are placed and that too in some lower amount of Annual package, so it will be better if you find external placements or start finding jobs and doing external internships during college. Very less companies visits our college and few students were placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings of the college are very amazing. Classrooms are clean and various facilities are available for all the students, workers, teachers like canteen, mess food for hostel students, clean washrooms, playground, sports room, as well as Medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good environment.

content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are not good. Our seniors are getting some placement offers. Around 20-25% of students get placed in our college. Less companies visit our college to offer placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. It provides many facilities like a canteen, hostel, cricket and volleyball ground, parks, and a big parking lot. Classrooms and labs are very good. Library is average, but it provides enough books for every student. Medical facilities are available.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Some of them are not knowledgeable and very poor at teaching. They help students in every way possible. Semester exams are not difficult if students study properly throughout the semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is quite good for external students.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Our college provides 100% placements. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are TCS, L&T, and Essar.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has average facilities because our college is in a rural area. But it has the best facilities among all the rural colleges in this course. The infrastructure of our college is very good. It has a very good computer lab. It is Wi-Fi enabled. Our canteen offers good quality food.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

gallery_page.college_name: Vidhyadeep University Photos & Videos

reviews.review_heading: Good College with good campus and environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough. The college has a ground and a separate garden, and its campus is very good. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college and are free for all. There are around 6 buildings on the campus of different colleges of Vidyadeep University.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and infrastructure are fantastic.
reviews.review_text: The buildings, parks, labs, and overall infrastructure of this college are fantastic. The scenery is beautiful, and the atmosphere at the college is very peaceful. According to hostel students, mess food and hostel facilities are average. The canteen provides hygienic and good-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for enjoyment and degree but not that good about practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings of the college are very amazing. Classrooms are clean and various facilities are available for all the students, workers, teachers like canteen, mess food for hostel students, clean washrooms, playground, sports room, as well as Medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. It provides many facilities like a canteen, hostel, cricket and volleyball ground, parks, and a big parking lot. Classrooms and labs are very good. Library is average, but it provides enough books for every student. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite good for external students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average facilities because our college is in a rural area. But it has the best facilities among all the rural colleges in this course. The infrastructure of our college is very good. It has a very good computer lab. It is Wi-Fi enabled. Our canteen offers good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: This college has really good infrastructure, facilities and environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good. The college has Wi-Fi. There are 2-3 labs, classes and a library. Hostel is not too good but it is okay. Medical facilities are good. There are many computers in the lab. The college has a ground for volleyball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, facilities, and a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides many good facilities like classrooms, a library, laboratories, a hostel, medical facilities, and sports accessories. The food served in the canteen and mess is good. All facilities are good according to the fee structure.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university that I have seen.
reviews.review_text: At our university, Wi-Fi is available at high-speed. Labs, classrooms, and a library are available on campus. The hostel is of the best quality and the food served in the mess and canteen is good and tasty. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vidhyadeep Institute of Engineering And Technology, Surat.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, but I learned from hostel friends that the hostel and mess are not very good. The hostel does not have some basic amenities like Wi-Fi. The hostel is far from this college, but there is a very good transport facility for it. The boy's and girl's hostels are different. It is like Reva in the hostel, and the infrastructure of the hostel is very good. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in case of faculty, campus, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels, one for boys and another for girls. Hostel facilities are very good. The quality of food in the hostel mess is very good and very tasty. We get food on time. The quality of the sleeping bed is also nice. Hostel warden helps to adjust the time for study.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its placements, infrastructure, and campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very big, and it provides a mess for the students who live in hostels and canteen for other students. According to the students of the hostel is not good. The food served in the hostel is average. Recently, a sports meet is also held.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is great and full of required facilities. Classrooms are good and clean.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure overall is great. But the current library is quite small and doesn't have adequate books. You get to have good gym, basketball court, badminton court, tt, pool, etc. The labs are equipped with really amazing tools but your are not allowed to use many of them by yourself.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. It is a good college for education and by maintaining discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and environment was peaceful. There is a total of 4 buildings. Only 2 wings are for engineering particularly. Facilities like libraries, canteen, computer lab, chemical lab and mechanical lab are available in related department. Only the girls' hostel is available in college. Boys' hostel is 3 -4 km away from the college. All sports and games are organised in sports week, and there is a lot of sports equipment available. Our college maintains good discip...

reviews.review_heading: Very dissatisfied because of the faculties and no placement facility but the infrastructure is good
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the class room is pretty good. All labs are also there with proper equipments. The hostel is far away from campus and canteen is in college campus, so it is very difficult for students. Food quality is good but it is boring to have same food daily.

reviews.review_heading: I had an average satisfaction at the time of graduation but dissatisfied with upper management.
reviews.review_text: At the time of joining, we were the first batch. As we were moving forward, the facilities were developed. The college provides facilities like labs, Wi-Fi campus and transportation facilities. The college building was for the pharmacy student, but due to poor strength of students, it was closed and the engineering department executed.

overview_faqs.question: Is KLE Vishwanath Katti Institute of Dental Sciences, Belagavi a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: KLE Vishwanath Katti Institute of Dental Sciences, Belagavi is a renowned institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. KLE Vishwanath Katti Institute of Dental Sciences, Belagavi boasts an impressive review rating of 4.2 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.5 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4.5 for Faculty, and 4.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: KLE Vishwanath Katti Institute of Dental Sciences, Belagavi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a beautiful journey with a strong support system.

content.Placements: Students who have passed out from this institute are doing very well in their respective departments and can be easily recognisable in a crowd as their way of handling patients. Talking to them and doing the work hands-on shows how well they have been guided throughout.
content.Infrastructure: Rooms are perfect. The mess is good, especially the local preparations, and they ensure the menu is different every time. We have Wi-Fi on the campus and even a great stocked library. I just wish they could look into food preparation for students who are studying here from different states from all over the country.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: The alumni of our college are widespread across the globe. Many students are placed in satellite research centres which benefits them in many ways. Students are exposed to a lot of conferences and workshops.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure. The college provides everything required for students to study peacefully. It's a green campus, and you can always go for a walk to calm yourself. There are a swimming pool, gym, animal farm, playground, central store, book store and parlour for girls, and an affordable laundry service on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A college with good and bad things.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't have major placements, but it does have some. No top recruiting companies have arrived yet. Only a few percent of people were placed in Indian companies. The top roles are not yet confirmed. Students are getting jobs on their own, and we don't clearly know the salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. It's not like those seen in movies. It's just a two-floor building in a narrow street and doesn't have a proper address. No Wi-Fi is provided in the college or hostel. Classrooms are just 90s style, and labs are in the old style. The hostels are just good, and food available in the mess is not good on most days.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of the college from my experience .

content.Placements: In our college, no batch completed their course, so no one got placed in companies. Internships are offered by the companies for our college students. Over 50% of the students got internships from our college in the respective companies, which will be useful for their future .
content.Infrastructure: Our faculty members are not very qualified at our college. The hostel, which is located inside the campus, is not good for the students and I won't prefer the hostel for the students. The food that was provided in the mess was not good. Sports Day will be conducted at our college every year .

individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of everything.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 1.3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 1 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was Rs. 85,000 per annum. Many international companies visited our college to recruit students. Many students got internships from our college in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The library was good. Our classrooms were average. The laboratory was good. Our college has a ground to play sports. The hostel was good. The food served in the hostel was average. The food served in the canteen was very good and tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Placements and faculty are great.

review_content.Placements: In B.A.M.S. course, students are paced highly in different type of hospitals. Ayurved hospital and modern hospital both employ B.A.M.S. student as medical officers. Student can give Gujarat public commission and Union public service commission ayurved medical officer examination and become government Ayurved medical officer. Different Ayurvedic colleges also recruit as faculty. Opportunities are increasing as scientists and clinical researchers in ayurved studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has full-fledged library with lots of books. Classrooms are decent and Wi-Fi is available from department to department. Boys hostel is not maintained well. Mess and drinking water are not available in hostels. Girls' hostel is well maintained and strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and stipend .

review_content.Placements: My experience in this college and hospital was 1-year. Give you a stipend of 12,600/month. Then you have to go for higher studies like MD, MS, Ph.D., and Post-graduation were available at this institute. In two subjects Guna and ras shastra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in this college was good, and the hostel facility for a girl is good, but in the boy's hostel, there is no water for drinking. Even washrooms are not cleaned regularly. There is no mess or canteen facility in this college and boys' hostel too, but there is a small botanical garden.

In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and the college has a nice infrastructure.

content.Placements: Overall, nice placements for students, but the rate is still the same as before and also now a days, seats are getting increased year by year. Nice opportunity to get admission in our college. All students who complete this course from our college, get recruited as interns in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the college has a nice infrastructure. Nowadays, projector is also available in our college for better academics through PPT, it makes explanation easy. There is no mess and canteen in our hostel, so this is to be included in our college. Sports should be priority in our college.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is like a lifeline for me to learn.

content.Placements: Placements are varying on the basis of students' ambitions like medical officers or further studies like MD through AIAPGET. Job opportunities like medical officer in CHC PHC through GPSC examination are there. Also, students can establish their own clinics after degree.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is fully equipped with high tech wi-fi. Also hostel rooms are fully connected to wi-fi facilities. Labs are spacious and equipped with high technology instruments. Classrooms are well maintained. Library is moderately maintained but there are a lot of books to study. There is no such canteen in our college or hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and stipend .

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in this college was good, and the hostel facility for a girl is good, but in the boy's hostel, there is no water for drinking. individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Ayurved College, Vadodara.

content.Placements: Placements are varying on basis of students' ambition. Students write AIAPGET and GPSC exams to become medical officers. Job opportunities are fewer. Students become assistants and doctors in Modern Allopathy Hospitals. Now things are changed, the course is converting into skill-based. Many government posts are coming from different states so it has a good future ahead.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are well-structured. Facilities of mess and water are not available in the boys' hostel. Authority doesn't even bother with what students are going through. But if you want to live alone then the place is excellent. Girls' hostel is strictly maintained and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our institute is the best for this course than other institutes!
reviews.review_text: Our college has good Wi-Fi connection. Modern labs and classrooms are available along with a good library. Faculty members are very supportive and encouraging. Hostel’s mess is healthy and hygienic. Medical services are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best for this course compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good Wi-Fi connection, a modern lab, modern classrooms, and very good library service. The food in our hostel mess is very healthy and hygienic. In our college hospital, medical services are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and good academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure. It has classrooms, labs, and a library, but it does not provide Wi-Fi. The hostel has good cleaning and sanitation facilities. The hostel is good. The college has a hospital on its campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent facilities and a pleasant campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The library was good, but sometimes there was an issue with the opening time. Classrooms were good and had proper ventilation. There were very good hostel facilities in the college, but sometimes the food was not as good as we expected. Our college had a proper hospital with all types of Panchakarma facilities. There was minor OT and major OT for surgery.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for learning.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are good. A mess system is available in hostels. In our hospital, patients get free treatment. For one year, the hostel fee is only Rs.1200. There are sports and games available. There is an NSS unit in our college.

The authority didn't even bother with what students were going through. If you wanted to live alone, then the place was excellent. Girls' hostel was strictly-maintained and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Theoretical and practicals are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very poor. It needs improvement. Infrastructure is very old. No improvement or renovation is done since the building has built. If infrastructure is neglected, the college is good. For studies and learning, hospital has good exposure in terms of patients.

reviews.review_heading: Old building but education with degitalisation.
reviews.review_text: Staff of this college is superb. There is building off old infrastructure but teachers are good. There is no canteen in our college because we have many stalls outside the college so we can get food from there. And all classroom have projectors so everyone can study by digital technics like visual.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great knowledge-providing institute with above-average infrastructure and great teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure has good labs with all the necessary instruments and facilities. Classrooms are constantly updated to meet the needs of the students, such as a projector for visual learning. The library has a good collection of books. The hostel is kept clean and has a good mess of food.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members for BAMS are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college library has 5000 books. It is good for students to study and research. Our college has an attached hospital. Many patients come to the hospital, and we get a huge practical experience. Our college has 2 hostels, one for boys and one for girls.
